title: We raised $150m in Series D funding!
excerpt:

posts.author: Julia-monday.com (Julia Fagelman)
posts.cookedHtml:
In case you didn’t hear the news already, we’re super excited to announce that we have raised $150m in Series D funding, led by our new investment partner, Sapphire Ventures!!

We want to give a special thank you to YOU, our amazing community, for being such committed and loyal partners in this journey. We can’t wait to see where it takes us!

image%20(5)960×480 108 KB

Read more in the blog post [https://bit.ly/317t0Ki]

posts.author: PabloVerano (Pablo Verano)
posts.cookedHtml: Congratulations! Very excited for what this can mean for us as users
